title: chore(deps): update dependency eslint-plugin-jest to v21.17.0
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [eslint-plugin-jest](https://github.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest) from `v21.13.0` to `v21.17.0`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

[Compare Source](https://github.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/compare/v21.16.1...v21.17.0)
##### Features

* add fixer for lowercase-name rule ([#​119](`https://github.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/119`)) ([d7f3de3](https://github.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/commit/d7f3de3)), closes [#​118](`https://github.com/jest-community/eslint-plugin-jest/issues/118`)
